root_causes_fixed: The prior deployment still referenced runtime-config.js and nav-map.js with the stale r6 cache token, allowing the browser and GitHub Pages CDN to reuse incompatible JavaScript with newer label assets.

Native label sources and symbol layers were registered after the map load event; a failed font or source readiness path could leave the satellite and mask visible while every label layer remained absent.
The visible label stack used an alias that did not exactly match the embedded font family, with no verified runtime fallback when WebGL text rendering returned zero labels.

fixes.cache_busting: All CSS, runtime-config and JavaScript references use r8; GitHub Actions builds with the R8 map data version.
fixes.renderer: MapLibre native WebGL symbol layers defined in the initial style; no DOM or canvas label overlay.
fixes.font: Exact embedded FontFace family UniQAIDAR Hewal 031 with native local-font fallback and runtime rendered-label health check.
fixes.source_order: Core, viewport and custom label sources exist before the initial style is committed.
fixes.layer_order: Label layers render above the mask and boundary and below route/GPS layers.
fixes.major_label_visibility: Region, governorate and city layers remain visible while lower tiers use collision management.
fixes.progressive_loading: 227 core labels load first; 46,600 detail labels are loaded by viewport from 160 geographic shards; search remains nonblocking.

verification.mobile_visual_verification: required after GitHub Pages deployment; not claimed as completed in this container
